verse_text: Then God said to Abraham, 'As for Sarai your wife, you shall not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall be her name.

links.context: John means "grace of God." By insisting on the name God chose for her son, Elizabeth affirms God has called John to a specific mission (see also 1:31; [[GEN.17:5]], [[GEN.17:15]]; 32:28).
